channel.title: Comments for page "Wayfarers Hub"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Wayfarers Hub"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Nice to see this all collected in one place. All good stuff.

item.title: Its got a hub now too!
item.content:encoded:
Alright. So now the little tale series that maybe could, has a little series hub. Its been a long time in the making, but its time to finally put a cap on this series.

Special thanks to A Random Day, Taffeta, Randomini, and TyGently for looking over the hub as a draft.

Extra special thanks to DreamwalkerFae and kol aumer for being on the team that made this entire series a reality.

And that is that.
